---
title: "ITensor"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# MPO

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
@doc MPO
````

## definition

### basic operators

#### Way 1 (recommended)

```{julia}
sites = siteinds("Qubit", 4)
os = OpSum() # 不用显式写那些 I
os += "X", 1, "H", 2
os += "Proj0", 2, "Sz", 3
os += "S+", 3, "Sz", 4
H = MPO(os, sites)
Rx90  = op("Rx", sites[1]; θ = π/2) 
H = apply(Rx90, H; cutoff=1e-12)
```

> the supported operators are as follow.
"I"       # identity
"X"       # Pauli X
"Y"       # Pauli Y
"iY"      # i * Pauli Y
"Z"       # Pauli Z

"H"       # Hadamard
"Phase"   # phase gate, alias: "P", "S"
"π/8"     # T gate, alias: "T"

"Proj0"   # |0><0|
"Proj1"   # |1><1|

"Sz"      # S^z = 1/2 σz
"Sx"      # S^x = 1/2 σx
"Sy"      # S^y = 1/2 σy
"iSy"     # i S^y
"S+"      # raising
"S-"      # lowering
"S2"      # S^2

#### Way 2

```{julia}
sites = siteinds("Qubit",4)
ops = ["I" for _ in 1:4] 
ops[1] = "Z" 
ops[4] = "X" 
O=MPO(sites,ops)
```

### multiple qubits gate

```{julia}
psi = random_mps(sites; linkdims=2)
gates = [
    op("H", sites[1]),
    op("CNOT", sites[1], sites[2]),
    op("Rx", sites[3]; θ = π/2),
    op("CZ", sites[2], sites[4]),
]
psi = apply(gates, psi; cutoff=1e-12)
```
